nasb.text: Outside the sword will bereave, And inside terror— Both young man and virgin, The nursling with the man of gray hair.

esv.text: Outdoors the sword shall bereave, and indoors terror, for young man and woman alike, the nursing child with the man of gray hairs.

cnv.text: 外有刀劍， 內有驚恐，使人喪亡， 使少男少女， 嬰孩和白髮老人，盡都喪亡。

ccb.text: 外有刀剑杀戮， 内有恐惧笼罩， 少男、少女、婴儿、 老人无一幸免。
